page_content:
Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits to

complete a degree.

Requirements for Graduation: CO At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level LJ 12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD

*Excluded from the 2.0 average calculation

Updated 8/2012
